title: California Commercial Driver License (CDL) Application
description: Apply for a California Commercial Learner's Permit (CLP) as the first step toward a Class A, B, or C Commercial Driver's License (CDL) through the California Department of Motor Vehicles. This document models the CDL/CLP application (Form DL 44C / eDL 44C): applicant identity, the existing noncommercial licence prerequisite, the class and endorsements requested, the federal self-certification of commerce type, prior-licence history, and medical certification. It does not model the later in-person skills test or CDL issuance, and it does not submit the application; the live dmv.ca.gov source is always authoritative (see verification).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the official CA DMV CDL overview and commercial driver handbook Section 1 (introduction), plus the federal CDL endorsement/restriction code table at 49 CFR 383.153 and the federal self-certification categories at 49 CFR 383.71/391.11 (both incorporated by reference into California's program, so cited directly as the primary source for those enumerations). The CLP eligibility prerequisites, the class/endorsement/self-certification fields, and the prior-licence-history and medical-certificate triggers were confirmed against these sources; individual field labels reflect the DL 44C / eDL 44C application but the live online form's exact screen-by-screen order was not captured. Status remains 'draft' pending full field-by-field source review of the eDL 44C flow itself. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. True full legal name as it appears on your identity document.

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: First name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: middleName
fields.label: Middle name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Full date, YYYY-MM-DD. Applicant must be at least 18 to drive intrastate commerce; at least 21 is required to drive interstate commerce, transport hazardous materials, or hold the hazardous materials or tank vehicle endorsements.

fields.name: socialSecurityNumber
fields.label: Social Security number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. 9 digits, no dashes. An original Social Security card is required to confirm this for a first CDL application.
fields.sourceRef: CDL overview — proof of Social Security number

fields.name: californiaDriverLicenseNumber
fields.label: Current California driver's license number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. You must already hold a valid California noncommercial Class C driver's license (a temporary/interim licence is acceptable) before a CLP can be issued. One letter followed by 7 digits, e.g. D1234567.

fields.name: residenceAddressLine1
fields.label: Residence address — street address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Must match a residency document if you have never held a California DL or ID.

fields.name: residenceAddressLine2
fields.label: Residence address — apartment, suite, or unit (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: residenceAddressCity
fields.label: Residence address — city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: residenceAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Residence address — ZIP code
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. 5-digit or ZIP+4 format, e.g. 90210 or 90210-1234. The state is California (US-CA).

fields.name: cdlClassRequested
fields.label: Commercial licence class requested
fields.description: class_a = any combination of vehicles with a gross combination weight rating of 26,001+ lbs where the towed unit exceeds 10,000 lbs; class_b = any single vehicle with a gross vehicle weight rating over 26,000 lbs (or towing a unit of 10,000 lbs or less); class_c = a smaller vehicle that nonetheless requires a CDL because it is designed to transport 16+ people (including the driver) or placarded hazardous materials.

fields.name: endorsementHazardousMaterials
fields.label: Hazardous materials endorsement (H)
fields.description: Requires a TSA security threat assessment in addition to the knowledge test. If both this and endorsementTankVehicle are true, California issues the combined X endorsement instead of separate H and N endorsements (49 CFR 383.153).

fields.name: endorsementTankVehicle
fields.label: Tank vehicle endorsement (N)
fields.description: Knowledge test required. See endorsementHazardousMaterials for the combined-X rule when both are requested.

fields.name: endorsementPassenger
fields.label: Passenger endorsement (P)
fields.description: Knowledge and skills tests required. Needed to transport 16 or more people including the driver.

fields.name: endorsementSchoolBus
fields.label: School bus endorsement (S)
fields.description: Knowledge and skills tests required; requires the passenger endorsement as well.

fields.name: endorsementDoubleTriple
fields.label: Double/triple trailers endorsement (T)
fields.description: Knowledge test required. Needed to pull two or three trailers at once (Class A only).

fields.name: selfCertifiedCommerceType
fields.label: Self-certified type of commercial motor vehicle operation
fields.description: Federal self-certification categories (49 CFR 383.71): non_excepted_interstate = interstate commerce, subject to full federal driver qualification and medical certificate rules; excepted_interstate = interstate commerce, exempt from the federal medical certificate rule; non_excepted_intrastate = California only, still requires a medical examiner's certificate; excepted_intrastate = California only, exempt from the medical certificate rule. If any interstate operation is possible, DMV guidance recommends certifying interstate rather than intrastate. non_excepted_intrastate carries a DMV-applied Intrastate Only (K) restriction.
fields.sourceRef: Commercial driver handbook §1 — self-certification of commerce type

fields.name: licensedInOtherJurisdictionLast10Years
fields.label: Have you held a driver's license of any kind, in any other US state or jurisdiction, at any time in the last 10 years?
fields.description: If true, a completed 10 Year History Record Check (Form DL 939) covering that period must also be provided.
fields.sourceRef: CDL overview — 10 Year History Record Check (DL 939)

fields.name: medicalExaminerCertificateExpirationDate
fields.label: Medical Examiner's Certificate (MEC) expiration date
fields.description: Full date, YYYY-MM-DD. Required for both non_excepted_interstate and non_excepted_intrastate self-certification; not required for the two excepted categories (leave at the source form's 'not applicable' option in that case). Issued from a Medical Examination Report (MCSA-5875) and Medical Examiner's Certificate (MCSA-5876) completed within 2 years by an examiner on the FMCSA National Registry.
fields.sourceRef: CDL overview — Medical Examination Report / Medical Examiner's Certificate

steps.title: Identify yourself and your current licence
